result.summary: Found 2 major visual issues: navigation tab text is truncated and game card titles are cut off, indicating layout/responsive design problems.

issues.description: Navigation tab text is truncated - 'Hot Gar' appears instead of the full text (likely 'Hot Games'), indicating insufficient space for the tab label
issues.suggestion: Adjust the navigation layout to properly accommodate all tab labels. Consider using shorter labels, reducing padding, or implementing a responsive design that stacks tabs on smaller screens

issues.description: Game card titles in both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections appear to be cut off or partially hidden (e.g., 'MAGNI', 'MUNG' visible instead of full titles)
issues.suggestion: Ensure game card containers have sufficient width and that text wrapping is enabled. Consider using CSS overflow properties (overflow: hidden with text-overflow: ellipsis) or adjusting the grid layout to prevent text cutoff
